system:
You answer questions about a synthetic world using ONLY the provided episode excerpts.

Episode statements and their exact semantics:
- Observation "valid from day X": the fact holds at EVERY day >= X, forever. Facts never expire on their own.
- Observation "valid from day X until day Y": the fact holds for X <= day < Y.
- Policy (IF conditions THEN conclusion): at the evaluation day, if all conditions hold (matching shared variables like ?A consistently), the conclusion holds. Policies chain: a conclusion may satisfy another policy's condition.
- A policy applies only from its effective day onward, and only if not superseded.
- UNLESS exception: if the exception pattern is satisfiable for that binding, the policy does not fire for it.
- Supersession notice: from the stated day, the old policy stops applying (entirely, or only for bindings matching the stated condition). A superseded policy's conclusions are gone from that day unless re-derivable another way.
- Higher authority policies beat lower authority ones when they conflict; later-issued beats earlier at equal authority.

Answering:
- The question names the evaluation day. Evaluate at exactly that day.
- Answer true only if the fact is stated valid at that day or derivable via policies from facts valid at that day. Otherwise answer false.
- For true/false questions reply with exactly one word: true or false.
- For list questions reply with ONLY a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Episodes:

=== Episode ep_230 (day 151) ===
Logged day 146 and valid from day 146, registry_A entry fct_0123 records that offered_in(asset=asset_06, asset2=asset_06, sector=sector_21).
Effective day 146 and filed on day 146, rule rul_011 — “exempt_from policy 1” at authority level 5 — decrees that whenever eligible_for(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_00, product=?A) and registered_in(sector=?B, partner=partner_00, customer=?E), the necessary consequence is exempt_from(product=?A, sector=?B).
As of day 148, the desk launched the Kestrel live exercise, its scenario running in lockstep with the real world’s unfolding developments.
Repository field_report, as of day 149 and in force from day 149 through day 212, supplies fct_0712 attesting that partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_23, product=product_22).
The entry from jurisdiction_16 on day 151 arrived so soaked in derision it could never be read as a genuine assertion: “Oh sure, holds(product=product_15, product2=product_17, partner=partner_13) — obviously.”

=== Episode ep_277 (day 261) ===
registry_B logged on day 261 that located_in(asset=asset_05, asset2=asset_18, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_07) — entered as fct_0733, valid from day 261.
On day 261, registry_A recorded, with effect from day 261, supplies(customer=customer_15, sector=sector_01, partner=partner_05) (fct_0838).
The Paper Meridian, as of day 261, relates that offered_in(asset=asset_19, asset2=asset_12, sector=sector_02) — noted as fct_0912.
Policy rul_026 ("exempt_from policy 3 (revised)"), carrying authority level 5, was taken down on day 261 and takes effect from day 261: IF eligible_for(jurisdiction=?C, product=?A) AND registered_in(sector=?B, partner=partner_15, customer=customer_14) AND registered_in(sector=?B, partner=partner_15, customer=customer_14) THEN exempt_from(product=?A, sector=?B), UNLESS member_of(product=?A, partner=partner_07).
Notice sup_004, logged day 261, makes rul_026 supersede rul_013 as of day 261; from that day, rul_013 no longer applies.

=== Episode ep_126 (day 11) ===
On day 11, audit_note logged fct_0263 — effective from day 11 — that rated_as(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_09, product=product_16, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_00).
fct_0268, drawn from registry_B on day 11 and valid from day 11, records rated_as(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_08, product=product_12, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_00).
A field_report submitted day 11, designated fct_0333 and in force as of day 11, details that holds(product=product_15, product2=product_00, partner=partner_13).
Logged day 11 via field_report, fct_0334 establishes — with effect from day 11 — that offered_in(asset=asset_08, asset2=asset_08, sector=sector_11).

=== Episode ep_252 (day 195) ===
Under Coldharbor, policy rul_039 ("restricted_in policy 3 (scenario-narrowed)", authority level 2) is logged on day 195 and takes effect from day 195: IF supplies(customer=customer_10, sector=sector_20, partner=?A) AND holds(product=product_26, product2=product_26, partner=?B) THEN restricted_in(partner=?A, partner2=?B), UNLESS holds(product=product_12, product2=product_05, partner=?B).
asset_15 made sure the record preserved this little masterpiece of emphatic understatement on day 195: “Oh sure, rated_as(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_20, product=product_11, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_13) — obviously.”
Entered on day 195, notice sup_017, in force within Coldharbor, replaces rul_005 with rul_039 effective from day 195; for purposes beyond the exercise, rul_005 stands as before.

=== Episode ep_243 (day 182) ===
On day 179, jurisdiction_16 submitted forecast fct_0993, anticipating that located_in(asset=asset_09, asset2=asset_01, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_09) will hold.
Day 180 brings an audit_note entry, fct_0743, in force from day 180: rated_as(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_06, product=product_01, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_01).
Filed on day 180 and effective from day 180, rul_031 — “exempt_from policy 1 (revised)”, authority level 5 — lays down that IF eligible_for(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_00, product=?A) AND registered_in(sector=?B, partner=partner_00, customer=?E) THEN exempt_from(product=?A, sector=?B), UNLESS rated_as(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_15, product=?A, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_14).
Notice sup_009, posted day 180, records that as of day 180 rul_031 supersedes rul_011; rul_011 no longer applies from that day onward.
As of day 182, registry_A captures fact fct_0578, valid from day 182: registered_in(sector=sector_16, partner=partner_10, customer=customer_08).

=== Episode ep_257 (day 210) ===
A customer_disclosure entry logged on day 204 — reference fct_0677, effective from day 204 — confirms that holds(product=product_04, product2=product_19, partner=partner_10).
In Ten Days of Grey, day 204 has it that located_in(asset=asset_18, asset2=asset_16, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_05) — noted as fct_0938.

=== Episode ep_273 (day 252) ===
In Ten Days of Grey, day 252 has it that rated_as(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_18, product=product_18, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_13) — noted as fct_0924.
Policy rul_024 ("eligible_for_1 policy 2 (revised)", authority level 3) was logged on day 252 and effective from day 252: IF exempt_from(product=?C, sector=?A) AND offered_in(asset=?B, asset2=?B, sector=?A) AND supplies(customer=?D, sector=?A, partner=?E) THEN eligible_for_1(sector=?A, asset=?B), UNLESS located_in(asset=?B, asset2=asset_06, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_06) OR supplies(customer=customer_15, sector=sector_01, partner=?E).

=== Episode ep_210 (day 100) ===
As of day 97, policy rul_022 ("eligible_for_1 policy 2", authority 3) lays down that when exempt_from(product=?C, sector=?A) and offered_in(asset=?B, asset2=?B, sector=?A) and supplies(customer=?D, sector=?A, partner=?E), then eligible_for_1(sector=?A, asset=?B), unless located_in(asset=?B, asset2=asset_06, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_06) — in effect from day 97.

Day 100 sees registry_B’s submission, fct_0081 (effective day 100), noting rated_as(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_07, product=product_11, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_07).
